immutable_core.semantic_intent: source-supplied hourly SOFA rolling 24-hour score time series
immutable_core.semantic_definition: An ICU-stay hourly SOFA time-series asset preserving the source-supplied rolling 24-hour total SOFA score as the primary standardized value, together with same-row official component score context.
immutable_core.semantic_grain: one row per ICU stay hour
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Any database asset published as std_sofa must preserve SOFA score/composite time-series semantics, a governed time basis, component traceability, and score value meaning; it must not silently change into raw labs, raw vitals, treatment events, Sepsis-3 onset, AKI phenotype, or mortality risk prediction.

score_phenotype_contract.time_basis_rule: retain the approved source SOFA hourly grid and explicitly expose the hour index and one-hour score slice boundaries
score_phenotype_contract.component_trace_rule: retain same-row current-hour and rolling 24-hour organ component scores when source supplied
score_phenotype_contract.score_value_rule: use std_sofa_total_24hours as the primary standardized score value in score_points
score_phenotype_contract.no_row_interpretation: no retained SOFA row means no approved source-supplied SOFA row under this mapping, not proof of zero organ dysfunction

execution_governance.formal_output_rule: Formal std_sofa outputs should go through execution.py reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec.
